pi_items.source: Verified existence of bologna_pasubio directory and scenario files in SUMO documentation and local filesystem.

privileged_info_summary: The correct first bus stop location is on lane '2[1][1][1]b_0' with startPos 35 and endPos 55. Running the SUMO simulation correctly with the requested battery parameters (starting at 150000 Wh) results in a minimum actualBatteryCapacity of exactly 150000.00 Wh, because the buses' default emissionClass does not consume electric energy, so the charge level never drops below the initial value. A successful agent report should indicate 'charging_lane=2[1][1][1]b_0' and 'min_battery_wh=150000.00'.
